title: Class of 2020 Convocation
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Class of 2020 Convocation
NYU Shanghai held a virtual Convocation on Sunday, May 31, 2020 for graduates of the inaugural classes of the university’s master’s programs in Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages (TESOL), Quantitative Finance, and Data Analytics & Business Computing.
During the event, NYU President Andrew Hamilton, NYU Shanghai Chancellor Yu Lizhong, Vice Chancellor Jeffrey Lehman, Provost Joanna Waley-Cohen, NYU Steinhardt Interim Dean Pamela Morris, and NYU Stern Dean Raghu Sundaram delivered messages recognizing the pioneering accomplishments of the 62 graduates at NYU Shanghai’s first Graduate Convocation. Student speakers, Xu Siqi, MA ‘20, and Wu Kaiwen, MS ‘20, represented their respective programs, and each graduate's name was read by faculty representatives. This was followed by a ceremonial "hooding" of all graduates.
Watch the 2020 Master's Convocation highlight video:
Watch the entire ceremony here.
Read more about the Convocation here.
Graduate Spotlights:
Dai Weiduo, M.S. '20, James Yang Zhi, M.A. ’20, Jiyoung Kim, M.S. ’20, Wu Kaiwen B.A. ’19, M.S. ’20, Xu Feng, M.A. '20, Li Yimeng, M.S. '20
